IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_7_AMT 
LABEL: 
Flexible Payment Amount — 7th (placeholder) 
DESCRIPTION: This field is a placeholder for a dollar amount to be used for a future policy. 
SHORT NAME: IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_7_AMT 
LONG NAME: IPPS_FLEX_PYMT_7_AMT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field is new in October 2014 (it is not populated). This field only applies to Inpatient
